title: The Weekly Closeout: Allbirds’ ‘AI-washing’ and Nike’s ongoing exec turnover
description: The footwear retailer announced a pivot no one saw coming, while another leader walked out the door at the sportswear giant.
title_en: Allbirds faces 'AI-washing' criticism as Nike experiences executive turnover
summary_ko: 신발 브랜드 Allbirds가 예상치 못한 AI 전략 전환을 발표했습니다. Nike는 지속적인 임원진 교체로 또 다른 리더가 회사를 떠났습니다. 두 브랜드 모두 혁신과 리더십에서 중요한 변화를 겪고 있습니다.
summary_en: Footwear retailer Allbirds announced an unexpected pivot toward AI strategy. Nike continues experiencing executive turnover with another leader departing the company. Both brands are undergoing significant changes in innovation and leadership approaches.
so_what_ko: AI 기술 도입 시 진정성 있는 가치 제공 없이 마케팅만 앞세우는 'AI 워싱'을 피해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must avoid 'AI-washing' by ensuring genuine value delivery rather than superficial AI marketing claims.
key_points: Allbirds announced unexpected AI strategy pivot
Nike faces ongoing executive leadership turnover
'AI-washing' concerns in retail industry
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도입 시 실질적 가치 창출 없는 '워싱' 전략은 브랜드 신뢰도를 해칠 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI adoption without genuine value creation risks damaging brand credibility through 'washing' strategies.

title: UK grocer Tesco goes all in on AI with Adobe
description:
U.K. grocery giant Tesco has teamed up with U.S. software giant Adobe to make supermarket shopping AI-infused and easier. Tesco plans to use Adobe’s agentic AI capabilities and Adobe Firefly Foundry to assist its personalization and AI teams in better anticipating customer needs. The retailer seeks to deliver better tailored content, offers and experiences across […]
The post UK grocer Tesco goes all in on AI with Adobe appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: UK grocery giant Tesco partners with Adobe for comprehensive AI shopping experience
summary_ko: 영국 대형 식료품 체인 Tesco가 Adobe와 파트너십을 체결하여 AI 기반 쇼핑 경험을 구축합니다. Adobe의 에이전틱 AI와 Firefly Foundry를 활용해 개인화 팀이 고객 니즈를 예측할 예정입니다. 맞춤형 콘텐츠와 오퍼, 경험을 전 채널에 걸쳐 제공하는 것이 목표입니다.
summary_en: UK grocery giant Tesco partnered with Adobe to create AI-infused shopping experiences. The retailer will use Adobe's agentic AI capabilities and Firefly Foundry to help personalization teams anticipate customer needs. The goal is delivering tailored content, offers, and experiences across all channels.
so_what_ko: 대형 소매업체의 Adobe 에이전틱 AI 도입은 D2C 브랜드들도 유사한 개인화 플랫폼 투자를 검토해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Major retailer's Adobe agentic AI adoption signals D2C brands should consider similar personalization platform investments.
key_points: Tesco partners with Adobe for AI-powered shopping
Implementation of agentic AI capabilities
Focus on personalization and customer need anticipation
Cross-channel tailored content delivery
one_line_insight_ko: 대형 식료품 체인의 에이전틱 AI 도입은 개인화 기반 고객 경험이 소매업계 필수 요소임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Major grocer's agentic AI adoption demonstrates personalized customer experience is becoming essential in retail.

title: The growing debate over digital price tags
description: This week's episode of the Modern Retail Podcast digs into the debate around electronic shelf labels.
title_en: Digital price tags spark growing retail industry debate
summary_ko: 전자 가격 표시 라벨(ESL)을 둘러싼 소매업계 논쟁이 확산되고 있습니다. 디지털 가격 태그의 도입과 관련된 다양한 이슈들이 제기되고 있습니다. 소매업계에서 가격 표시 기술의 변화가 중요한 화두로 부상했습니다.
summary_en: The retail industry is experiencing growing debate around electronic shelf labels (ESL). Various issues surrounding digital price tag implementation are being raised. Price display technology changes have become a significant topic in retail operations.
so_what_ko: 디지털 가격 태그 도입 시 고객 투명성과 운영 효율성 간의 균형을 신중히 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully balance customer transparency and operational efficiency when considering digital price tag adoption.
key_points: Growing debate over electronic shelf labels
Digital price tag implementation challenges
Retail operations technology evolution
one_line_insight_ko: 디지털 가격 표시 기술은 운영 효율성을 높이지만 고객 신뢰도 관리가 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Digital pricing technology improves operational efficiency but requires careful customer trust management.

title: Iris Founder Talks AI-Powered Finance
description:
Drew Fallon's platform forecasts profitability, cash flow, inventory, and more — anything a CFO would do, he says.
The post Iris Founder Talks AI-Powered Finance appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: Iris platform delivers AI-powered finance solutions for ecommerce CFOs
summary_ko: Drew Fallon의 Iris 플랫폼이 AI 기반 금융 솔루션을 제공합니다. 이 플랫폼은 수익성, 현금 흐름, 재고 등을 예측합니다. CFO가 수행하는 모든 업무를 AI로 처리할 수 있다고 개발자는 설명합니다.
summary_en: Drew Fallon's Iris platform provides AI-powered financial solutions for ecommerce. The platform forecasts profitability, cash flow, inventory, and more financial metrics. The founder claims it can handle anything a CFO would typically manage.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 재무 예측 도구는 D2C 브랜드의 재고 관리와 현금 흐름 최적화에 필수적인 솔루션이 될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI-powered financial forecasting tools can become essential for D2C brands' inventory management and cash flow optimization.
key_points: AI platform forecasts profitability and cash flow
Comprehensive financial management automation
Ecommerce-focused CFO functionality
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 재무 예측 플랫폼은 D2C 브랜드의 데이터 기반 의사결정을 혁신적으로 개선할 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered financial forecasting platforms can revolutionize data-driven decision making for D2C brands.

title: Backcountry acquires Coalatree as it debuts brand incubator
description: The retailer, which bought cycling company Velotech in September, is looking for more partnerships with up-and-coming brands.
title_en: Backcountry launches brand incubator with Coalatree acquisition
summary_ko: 아웃도어 리테일러 Backcountry가 브랜드 인큐베이터를 출범하며 Coalatree를 인수했습니다. 9월에 자전거 회사 Velotech을 인수한 바 있는 이 회사는 신흥 브랜드와의 파트너십을 확대하고 있습니다. 성장하는 브랜드들과의 협력에 적극적으로 나서고 있습니다.
summary_en: Outdoor retailer Backcountry launched a brand incubator with the acquisition of Coalatree. The company, which bought cycling company Velotech in September, is expanding partnerships with emerging brands. They are actively seeking collaborations with up-and-coming brands.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 인큐베이터 모델은 기존 D2C 브랜드가 신규 브랜드 육성을 통해 포트폴리오를 확장하는 새로운 성장 전략입니다.
so_what_en: Brand incubator models represent new growth strategies for established D2C brands to expand portfolios through emerging brand development.
key_points: Backcountry debuts brand incubator program
Coalatree acquisition following Velotech purchase
Focus on partnerships with emerging brands
one_line_insight_ko: 기존 브랜드의 인큐베이터 모델은 신규 브랜드 발굴과 육성을 통한 차별화된 성장 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Established brands' incubator models offer differentiated growth strategies through emerging brand discovery and development.

title: David’s Bridal adds two AI platforms as shopping channels
description:
David’s Bridal is now bringing its online storefront directly into popular artificial intelligence (AI) chat platforms to add new shopping channels. Shoppers can now browse and buy wedding gowns, bridesmaids’ dresses and other special-occasion attire via Microsoft Copilot and OpenAI’s ChatGPT. The in-app experience, which went live April 13, runs on Shopify’s new “agentic storefronts.” […]
The post David’s Bridal adds two AI platforms as shopping channels appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: David's Bridal integrates AI-powered shopping channels through ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot
summary_ko: 데이비드 브라이덜이 Microsoft Copilot과 OpenAI ChatGPT를 통해 AI 쇼핑 채널을 추가했습니다. 고객들은 이제 AI 챗 플랫폼에서 직접 웨딩드레스와 특별행사 의상을 탐색하고 구매할 수 있습니다. 이 서비스는 Shopify의 새로운 '에이전트 스토어프론트' 기술을 활용하여 4월 13일부터 시작되었습니다.
summary_en: David's Bridal has integrated AI-powered shopping channels through Microsoft Copilot and OpenAI's ChatGPT platforms. Customers can now browse and purchase wedding gowns, bridesmaids' dresses, and special-occasion attire directly within AI chat platforms. The service launched on April 13 using Shopify's new 'agentic storefronts' technology.
so_what_ko: AI 채팅 플랫폼을 새로운 판매 채널로 활용하는 것은 고객 접점을 확장하고 구매 여정을 단순화하는 혁신적 접근법입니다.
so_what_en: Leveraging AI chat platforms as new sales channels represents an innovative approach to expand customer touchpoints and streamline the purchase journey.
key_points: First major retailer to integrate shopping directly into ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot
Uses Shopify's new agentic storefront technology for seamless commerce integration
Enables browsing and purchasing special-occasion attire within AI chat interfaces
Represents shift toward conversational commerce through AI platforms
one_line_insight_ko: AI 챗봇을 통한 직접 쇼핑 기능은 고객과의 접점을 근본적으로 변화시키는 새로운 커머스 패러다임입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Direct shopping through AI chatbots represents a fundamental shift in commerce paradigms by transforming customer touchpoints.

title: Synthetic research is a promise with a catch
description:
Brands are rushing into AI-driven synthetic insights — but without governance and validation, results can mislead. Balance speed with accuracy.
The post Synthetic research is a promise with a catch appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Synthetic research offers promise but requires careful governance to avoid misleading insights
summary_ko: 브랜드들이 AI 기반 합성 인사이트로 급속히 이동하고 있지만, 거버넌스와 검증 없이는 잘못된 결과를 초래할 수 있습니다. 속도와 정확성 사이의 균형이 중요합니다. 적절한 검증 프로세스 없이는 합성 연구가 오히려 마케팅 의사결정을 잘못 이끌 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Brands are rapidly adopting AI-driven synthetic insights, but without proper governance and validation, results can be misleading. The key challenge is balancing speed with accuracy in research processes. Without adequate verification procedures, synthetic research risks misdirecting marketing decisions.
so_what_ko: 합성 연구 도입 시 검증 프레임워크와 거버넌스 체계를 먼저 구축해야 신뢰할 수 있는 마케팅 인사이트를 얻을 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Organizations must establish validation frameworks and governance systems before adopting synthetic research to ensure reliable marketing insights.
key_points: AI-driven synthetic research is gaining rapid adoption among brands
Lack of governance and validation can lead to misleading insights
Balance between speed and accuracy is crucial for reliable results
Proper verification procedures are essential for trustworthy synthetic research
one_line_insight_ko: 합성 연구의 속도 장점을 활용하되 검증 체계 없이는 잘못된 의사결정으로 이어질 수 있어 주의가 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: While synthetic research offers speed advantages, it requires robust validation systems to prevent misguided decision-making.

title: AI’s shortlist is the new B2B battleground
description:
G2’s latest research shows AI chatbots are now shaping B2B vendor visibility, shortlists and even final selections.
The post AI’s shortlist is the new B2B battleground appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI chatbots now influence B2B vendor selection and shortlist decisions
summary_ko: G2의 최신 연구에 따르면 AI 챗봇이 이제 B2B 벤더 가시성, 후보 목록 작성, 최종 선택에까지 영향을 미치고 있습니다. AI가 B2B 구매 여정에서 중요한 역할을 담당하게 되었습니다. 기업들은 AI 플랫폼에서의 가시성 확보가 새로운 경쟁 요소가 되었음을 인식해야 합니다.
summary_en: G2's latest research reveals that AI chatbots are now influencing B2B vendor visibility, shortlists, and final selections. AI has become a significant factor in the B2B buying journey. Companies must recognize that visibility on AI platforms has become a new competitive battleground.
so_what_ko: B2B 마케터들은 AI 챗봇 플랫폼에서의 브랜드 가시성과 정확한 정보 제공을 새로운 마케팅 우선순위로 설정해야 합니다.
so_what_en: B2B marketers must prioritize brand visibility and accurate information provision on AI chatbot platforms as a new marketing imperative.
key_points: AI chatbots significantly influence B2B vendor selection processes
Vendor visibility on AI platforms affects shortlist inclusion
G2 research confirms AI's growing role in B2B purchase decisions
New competitive battleground emerging around AI platform presence
one_line_insight_ko: AI 챗봇이 B2B 구매 결정에 미치는 영향력이 커지면서 AI 플랫폼에서의 브랜드 가시성이 새로운 경쟁 우위 요소가 되었습니다.
one_line_insight_en: As AI chatbots increasingly influence B2B purchasing decisions, brand visibility on AI platforms has become a new competitive advantage.

title: Reclaiming the power of the story — fueled by data and AI
description:
High-volume automation can often dilute your brand’s voice. Join us on May 6 to learn how to use AI as a creative partner, not a replacement.
The post Reclaiming the power of the story — fueled by data and AI appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Brands explore AI as creative partner to maintain authentic storytelling
summary_ko: 대량 자동화가 종종 브랜드 보이스를 희석시키는 상황에서, 브랜드들이 AI를 대체재가 아닌 창작 파트너로 활용하는 방법을 모색하고 있습니다. 5월 6일 세션에서 AI를 통한 창의적 스토리텔링 방법론을 다룰 예정입니다. 데이터와 AI를 활용하여 스토리의 힘을 되찾는 것이 핵심 주제입니다.
summary_en: As high-volume automation often dilutes brand voice, companies are exploring how to use AI as a creative partner rather than replacement. A May 6 session will address creative storytelling methodologies using AI. The focus is on reclaiming the power of storytelling through data and AI integration.
so_what_ko: 브랜드는 AI를 단순 자동화 도구가 아닌 창의적 파트너로 활용하여 개인화된 메시지를 전달하면서도 브랜드 정체성을 유지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Brands should leverage AI as a creative partner rather than mere automation tool to deliver personalized messages while maintaining brand identity.
key_points: High-volume automation can dilute authentic brand voice
AI should be positioned as creative partner, not replacement
Focus on maintaining storytelling authenticity with AI assistance
Data and AI integration can enhance rather than diminish creative output
one_line_insight_ko: AI를 창의적 파트너로 활용하는 접근법이 브랜드 정체성을 유지하면서 개인화된 콘텐츠를 제공하는 핵심 전략이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Using AI as a creative partner is becoming essential for delivering personalized content while preserving brand identity.

title: A 15-minute AI workflow to clean campaign data
description:
Fix inconsistent names, titles and company fields using AI and a spreadsheet, improve personalization and segmentation before you launch.
The post A 15-minute AI workflow to clean campaign data appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: 15-minute AI workflow streamlines campaign data cleaning for better personalization
summary_ko: AI와 스프레드시트를 활용한 15분 워크플로우로 캠페인 데이터의 불일치하는 이름, 직책, 회사명 필드를 정리할 수 있습니다. 이를 통해 캠페인 런칭 전 개인화와 세분화 품질을 향상시킬 수 있습니다. 간단한 AI 도구로도 데이터 품질을 크게 개선할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: A 15-minute AI workflow using spreadsheets can clean inconsistent names, titles, and company fields in campaign data. This improves personalization and segmentation quality before campaign launch. The approach demonstrates how simple AI tools can significantly enhance data quality.
so_what_ko: 데이터 정리를 위한 AI 워크플로우를 도입하면 마케팅 캠페인의 개인화 정확도를 높이고 고객 경험을 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Implementing AI workflows for data cleaning can improve marketing campaign personalization accuracy and enhance customer experience.
key_points: 15-minute AI workflow efficiently cleans campaign data inconsistencies
Improves personalization and segmentation before campaign launch
Uses accessible tools like AI and spreadsheets for data quality enhancement
Demonstrates practical application of AI for marketing operations
one_line_insight_ko: 간단한 AI 워크플로우로도 마케팅 데이터 품질을 크게 개선하여 개인화 캠페인의 효과를 높일 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Simple AI workflows can significantly improve marketing data quality, enhancing the effectiveness of personalized campaigns.

title: Tokenmaxxing, OpenAI’s shopping spree, and the AI Anxiety Gap
description: The gap between AI insiders and everyone else is widening, and the spending, suspicion, and even new vocabulary are starting to show it. While OpenAI is busy buying up everything from finance apps to talk shows, a certain shoe company just rebranded as an AI infrastructure play, and Anthropic unveiled a model it says is too powerful to release publicly …but apparently not too […]
title_en: OpenAI's Spending Spree Widens AI Industry Gap Amid Infrastructure Consolidation
summary_ko: OpenAI가 금융 앱부터 토크쇼까지 다양한 분야로 인수합병을 확대하고 있습니다. AI 업계 내부자들과 일반인 사이의 격차가 확대되고 있으며 새로운 용어들이 등장하고 있습니다. Anthropic은 공개하기에는 너무 강력하다고 주장하는 새 모델을 공개했습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI is expanding through acquisitions spanning from finance apps to talk shows, demonstrating aggressive market consolidation. The gap between AI industry insiders and the general public is widening, creating new vocabulary and spending patterns. Anthropic unveiled a new model they claim is too powerful for public release, highlighting the rapid advancement in AI capabilities.
so_what_ko: AI 기업들의 급격한 생태계 확장은 D2C 브랜드들이 다양한 AI 솔루션을 통합적으로 활용해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The rapid AI ecosystem expansion suggests D2C brands need to integrate diverse AI solutions holistically rather than relying on single-point solutions.
key_points: OpenAI pursuing aggressive acquisition strategy across multiple sectors
Growing divide between AI industry insiders and general market
Companies rebranding as AI infrastructure plays
New AI models emerging with unprecedented capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: AI 생태계의 급속한 통합이 진행되면서 브랜드들은 포괄적인 AI 전략이 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Rapid AI ecosystem consolidation requires brands to develop comprehensive AI strategies beyond point solutions.

title: Stop Making AI Slop – Build a Foundation for Authentic AI Content
description: Agentic AI works best when it’s architected to protect your brand’s unique identity and amplify a human-led point of view
title_en: Salesforce Emphasizes Authentic AI Content Over Generic AI-Generated Material
summary_ko: Salesforce는 브랜드 고유의 정체성을 보호하고 인간 주도적 관점을 증폭시키는 Agentic AI 구조의 중요성을 강조했습니다. 단순한 AI 생성 콘텐츠가 아닌 진정성 있는 AI 콘텐츠 제작이 필요하다고 주장합니다. AI 에이전트는 브랜드의 독특한 목소리를 유지하면서 작동해야 합니다.
summary_en: Salesforce emphasizes the importance of architecting Agentic AI to protect brand identity and amplify human-led perspectives. The company advocates for authentic AI content creation rather than generic AI-generated material. AI agents should operate while maintaining the brand's unique voice and values.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 콘텐츠 생성 시 브랜드 고유성과 진정성을 유지하는 프레임워크 구축이 필수적입니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must build frameworks that maintain brand authenticity and uniqueness when implementing AI content generation strategies.
key_points: Agentic AI should protect and amplify brand identity
Emphasis on authentic content over generic AI output
Human-led perspective remains crucial in AI implementation
Brand voice preservation in automated content creation
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트 구현 시 브랜드 진정성 유지가 경쟁우위의 핵심 요소입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Maintaining brand authenticity in AI agent implementation is the key differentiator for competitive advantage.

title: Unpacked: How loyalty programs power lifecycle marketing strategies
description: This Unpacked guide, sponsored by SheerID, explores how loyalty is no longer earned through rewards alone; it’s built through relevance, transparency and sustained commitment to understanding customers over time.  Shifts in consumer behavior — specifically the desire for data privacy and instant, personalized recognition — and AI’s acceleration of the buying process are making traditional […]
title_en: DoorDash Expands Beyond Food to Win Over Apparel and Retail Brands
summary_ko: DoorDash가 음식 배달을 넘어 소매 및 의류 브랜드와의 파트너십을 확대하고 있습니다. 회사의 기업 영업 및 사업 개발 담당 VP는 이러한 확장이 원래 비전의 자연스러운 연장선이라고 설명했습니다. 의류 브랜드들이 DoorDash 플랫폼에 관심을 보이고 있습니다.
summary_en: DoorDash is expanding beyond food delivery into retail and apparel brand partnerships as part of its platform evolution. The company's VP of enterprise sales describes this expansion as a natural extension of their original vision. Apparel brands are showing increasing interest in the DoorDash platform for retail distribution.
so_what_ko: 배달 플랫폼의 다각화는 D2C 브랜드들에게 새로운 즉석 배송 채널 기회를 제공하며, 옴니채널 전략 재검토가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Delivery platform diversification offers D2C brands new instant delivery channel opportunities, requiring omnichannel strategy reconsideration.
key_points: DoorDash expanding from food to retail and apparel partnerships
Platform diversification creating new distribution channels
Apparel brands adopting on-demand delivery models
Marketplace evolution beyond traditional categories
one_line_insight_ko: 배달 플랫폼의 카테고리 확장은 D2C 브랜드들에게 즉석 배송 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Delivery platform category expansion provides D2C brands with immediate fulfillment opportunities.

title: Marketplace Briefing: How DoorDash is winning over apparel brands
description: DoorDash is expanding beyond food delivery into retail and apparel partnerships. Mike Goldblatt, DoorDash's VP of enterprise sales and business development for grocery and retail, says the expansion is a natural extension of the company's original vision.
title_en: Modern Loyalty Programs Drive Lifecycle Marketing Through AI-Powered Personalization
summary_ko: 현대의 로열티 프로그램은 더 이상 리워드만으로 고객 충성도를 얻지 않으며 관련성, 투명성, 지속적인 고객 이해를 통해 구축됩니다. 데이터 프라이버시 요구와 즉석 개인화된 인식에 대한 소비자 행동 변화가 전통적인 접근법을 변화시키고 있습니다. AI의 구매 프로세스 가속화가 라이프사이클 마케팅 전략을 재정의하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Modern loyalty programs no longer earn customer loyalty through rewards alone but build it through relevance, transparency and sustained customer understanding. Consumer behavior shifts toward data privacy and instant personalized recognition are transforming traditional approaches. AI's acceleration of the buying process is redefining lifecycle marketing strategies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 개인화를 활용하여 전통적인 리워드 중심에서 관계 중심의 로열티 프로그램으로 전환해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must shift from traditional reward-based to relationship-focused loyalty programs leveraging AI-powered personalization.
key_points: Loyalty built through relevance and transparency, not just rewards
Consumer demand for data privacy and instant personalization
AI acceleration transforming traditional lifecycle marketing
Sustained customer understanding becoming competitive advantage
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 개인화가 로열티 프로그램의 패러다임을 리워드에서 관계 중심으로 전환시키고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered personalization is shifting loyalty program paradigms from reward-based to relationship-focused approaches.

title: Visa, Mastercard settle merchant claims
description: About 65 retailers suing the networks over card swipe fees in a New York case have now settled claims.
title_en: Visa and Mastercard Settle Merchant Fee Disputes with 65 Retailers
summary_ko: 뉴욕 소송에서 카드 스와이프 수수료를 놓고 네트워크 업체들을 고소한 약 65개 소매업체들이 클레임을 합의했습니다. Visa와 Mastercard가 가맹점 수수료 분쟁을 해결했습니다. 결제 네트워크와 소매업체 간의 장기간 분쟁이 마무리되었습니다.
summary_en: About 65 retailers who sued card networks over swipe fees in a New York case have reached settlement agreements. Visa and Mastercard have resolved merchant fee disputes that had been ongoing for an extended period. The settlement concludes long-standing litigation between payment networks and retail merchants.
so_what_ko: 결제 수수료 합의는 D2C 브랜드들의 결제 비용 구조 최적화 기회를 제공하며, 대안 결제 솔루션 검토가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Payment fee settlements provide D2C brands opportunities to optimize payment cost structures and consider alternative payment solutions.
key_points: 65 retailers settled card swipe fee disputes with major networks
Resolution of long-standing payment processing cost litigation
Potential impact on merchant fee structures
Settlement may influence future payment cost negotiations
one_line_insight_ko: 결제 수수료 분쟁 해결은 소매업체들의 비용 구조 재검토 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Payment fee dispute resolution provides retailers with cost structure optimization opportunities.
